task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or schedule screen is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., 'oscardoc' or 'Dr. Sarah Chen' visible in the interface).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the Master Demographic record for Michael Chang.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen displaying the Master Demographic record, search results, or patient profile specifically for 'Michael Chang'.

task_completion.description: Verify the provider field is set to Dr. Sarah Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the demographic edit screen, the 'Provider' dropdown or text field is set to 'Dr. Sarah Chen', 'oscardoc', or provider number '999998'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Roster Status is set to 'Rostered' (RO).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Roster Status' dropdown or field clearly displays 'Rostered' or 'RO'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Roster Date is set to today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Roster Date' field contains the current date (the date the task was performed).

task_completion.description: Verify the demographic updates were saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message is shown, or the updated Master Demographic view is displayed showing the new roster status, date, and provider outside of edit mode.

integrity.description: The agent used the OSCAR EMR web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OSCAR EMR application, rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are made within the genuine OSCAR EMR Master Demographic form, not in a text editor, HTML inspector, or mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running curl, python, or mysql commands to update the database directly.
